nodes.name: Mountain myzomela
nodes.summary: Mountain myzomela（Myzomela adolphinae）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Mountain myzomela。

nodes.name: Mountain myzomela
nodes.summary: The mountain myzomela (Myzomela adolphinae), also known as elfin myzomela or midget myzomela, is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is found in New Guinea. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. This species was named in honour of Adolphine Susanna Wilhelmina Bruijn. References
